title: Device Home Screen - No Device Connected - Supported List - Other Devices
scenario: "Supported Devices" link and "Other devices" button navigation from Device Home Screen with no device connected
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure no device is connected (Device Home screen shows 'No device connected').
expected: 1. Tapping 'Supported Devices' displays text matching the Figma design. 2. Tapping 'Other devices' opens the Poly support products web page (https://www.poly.com/us/en/support/products).
